text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
choice_data_list: What did you do with your time off?
What did you do with your time off?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I savored the deliciousness of doing nothing at
all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I just stayed in bed and watched cat videos.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Found myself waking up without realizing I was even dozing off... It was the best.

It sounds like Seiun Sky got all the rest she
needed!
